changes: Strict 6-char stamp code enforcement in UI and Settings. Persistent storage for default stamp code.
Fixed localStorage QuotaExceededError by removing large Base64 blobs from history.
Fixed 1-pixel alignment bug in border verification. Upgraded ZipVerifier with smart file discovery.
Added ZipVerifier component, About/Help sections, and improved Intent handling for ZIP files.
Added visual 1-pixel rectangle stamp to all protected images.
Initial production build with full ZIP bundling and Deed integrity fixes.
